mapper.sql:
SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT B.ATCL_ID , B.UP_ATCL_ID , A.BBS_ID , B.HDR_TYCD , B.ATCL_TTL , B.ATCL_CTS
, B.ATCL_LV , B.ATCL_SEQNO
, B.PROC_STSCD
, B.ATHR_ID
, B.INQ_CNT
, B.FVRT_CNT
, B.DSCSN_PROF_ID
, B.RGTR_ID , B.RGTRNM , B.REG_DTTM , B.MDFR_ID , B.MOD_DTTM , A.BBSNM , A.ATFL_USEYN , CASE WHEN A.ATFL_USEYN = 'Y' THEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = B.ATCL_ID) ELSE 0 END AS ATFL_MAX_CNT , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS WHERE UP_ATCL_ID = B.ATCL_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ANSWER_YN , CASE WHEN A.REG_DTTM > FN_DTTM_SUB(7) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_NEW , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_CMNT XX WHERE XX.ATCL_ID IN (SELECT ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID = B.ATCL_ID)) AS CMNT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_BBS A JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
AND A.BBS_ID IN (
#{item}
)
AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN WHERE BBS_ID = A.BBS_ID AND RLTN_REF_CD = A.SBJCT_ID AND CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE' )
AND LOWER(A.ATCL_TTL) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue}))
AND LOWER(A.RGTRNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue}))
AND ( LOWER(A.ATCL_TTL) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(A.RGTRNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
) A
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.listBbsAtcl 설 명 : 게시글 목록 */
/* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.listBbsAtclPaging 설 명 : 게시글 목록 페이징 */
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.bbsAtclHitsModify 설 명 : 게시글 조회수 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL SET INQ_CNT = #{inqCnt} + 1 WHERE ATCL_ID = #{atclId}
mapper.insert:
/* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.insertCopyAtcl 설 명 : 게시글 복사 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL ( ATCL_ID , UP_ATCL_ID , BBS_ID , HDR_TYCD , SBJCT_ID , THMB_FILE_ID
, ATCL_TTL , ATCL_CTS , ATCL_TAG_CD , ATCL_LV , ATCL_SEQ , NTCYN , CMNT_USEYN , NTC_SDTTM , NTC_EDTTM
, ATHR_ID , EDTRYN , INQ_CNT , FVRT_USEYN , FVRT_CNT
, IMPT_ATCLYN
, DELYN , UNIV_CD , REF_CMNT_ID
, RGTR_ID , RGTRNM , REG_DTTM ) SELECT #{atclId} , NULL , #{bbsId} , HDR_TYCD , #{crsCreCd} , THMB_FILE_ID
, ATCL_TTL , ATCL_CTS , ATCL_TAG_CD , ATCL_LV , ATCL_SEQ , NTCYN , CMNT_USEYN , NTC_SDTTM , NTC_EDTTM
, ATHR_ID , EDTRYN , 0 , FVRT_USEYN , 0
, IMPT_ATCLYN
, DELYN , UNIV_CD , REF_CMNT_ID
, #{rgtrId} , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = #{rgtrId})
, FN_DTTM_ADD_SEC(#{lineNo})
, FN_DTTM()
FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE ATCL_ID = #{copyAtclId}
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : BbsRltnDAO.updateBbsAtclForTrans 설 명 : 게시글 수정(선수강과목 이관용) */ UPDATE TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A INNER JOIN TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID SET A.BBS_ID = REPLACE(A.BBS_ID, #{rltnRefCd}, #{crsCreCd}) , A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE B.RLTN_REF_CD = #{rltnRefCd}
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.listRecentNotice 설 명 : 대시보드 전체 공지사항 목록 */
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
A.BBS_ID, A.ATCL_ID, A.ATCL_TTL,
A.INQ_CNT,
SUBSTR(A.REG_DTTM, 0, 8) AS REG_DTTM,
CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD WHERE ATCL_ID = A.ATCL_ID AND VWER_ID = #{vwerId}) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS INQYN FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A WHERE A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
AND ( A.UNIV_CD = 'P' OR A.UNIV_CD = #{uniCd} )
AND ( (A.DGRS_YR = #{haksaYear} AND A.DGRS_SMSTR = #{haksaTerm}) OR (A.DGRS_YR IS NULL AND A.DGRS_SMSTR IS NULL) )
ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC ) A

/* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.selectNoAnswerAtclStatus 설 명 : QnA, 1:1상담 미답변수 정보 */
SELECT TOTAL_CNT , ANS_CNT , TOTAL_CNT - ANS_CNT AS NO_ANS_CNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN ATCL.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND ATCL.DELYN = 'N' THEN 1 END ) AS TOTAL_CNT , COUNT(CASE WHEN ATCL.UP_ATCL_ID IS NOT NULL AND ATCL.DELYN = 'N' THEN 1 END ) AS ANS_CNT FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_OFRNG SBJCT ON BBS.SBJCT_OFRNG_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_OFRNG_ID AND SBJCT.DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.USEYN = 'Y' JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL ATCL ON BBS.BBS_ID = ATCL.BBS_ID WHERE BBS.SBJCT_OFRNG_ID = #{bbsId} AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = '1ON1' )
/* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.selectBbsAtclList 설 명 : 게시판게시글 목록 조회 (페이징) */

/* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.selectBbsAtcl 설 명 : 게시판게시글 조회 */ SELECT A.ATCL_ID , A.BBS_ID , A.USER_ID , A.UP_ATCL_ID , A.ATCL_TTL , A.ATCL_CTS , A.ATCL_HASH_TAG_CTS , A.ATCL_LV , A.ATCL_SEQNO , A.FVRT_CNT , A.INQ_CNT , A.PROC_STSCD , A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.DELYN , A.OYN , A.RSRVYN , A.RSRV_SDTTM , A.RSRV_EDTTM , A.CMNT_PRMYN , A.NTC_GBNCD , A.AUTO_ALIM_SDTTM , A.AUTO_ALIM_EDTTM , A.AUTO_ALIMYN , A.ORG_ID , A.DEPT_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.DVCLAS_NO , D.ATCL_OPTN_ID , B.ORG_ID , (SELECT ORGNM FROM TB_LMS_ORG WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID) AS ORGNM , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_DEPT WHERE DEPT_ID = A.DEPT_ID) AS DEPTNM , (SELECT SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID) AS SBJCTNM , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID = A.ATCL_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AS ANSWER_ATCL_CNT , CASE WHEN A.REG_DTTM > FN_DTTM_SUB(7) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_NEW , FN_REF_FILE_CNT(A.ATCL_ID) AS FILE_CNT , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS RGTRNM FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A JOIN TB_LMS_BBS B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON C.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_OPTN D ON A.ATCL_ID = D.ATCL_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.ATCL_ID = #{atclId}

/* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.selecBbsAtclPrevNext 설 명 : 게시판 이전글/다음글 조회 */ SELECT Z.* , (SELECT ATCL_TTL FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE ATCL_ID = Z.PREV_ATCL_ID) AS PREV_ATCL_TTL , (SELECT ATCL_TTL FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE ATCL_ID = Z.NEXT_ATCL_ID) AS NEXT_ATCL_TTL FROM ( SELECT ATCL_ID , LEAD(X.ATCL_ID, 1) OVER (ORDER BY LINE_NO DESC) AS PREV_ATCL_ID , LAG(X.ATCL_ID, 1) OVER (ORDER BY LINE_NO DESC) AS NEXT_ATCL_ID FROM (
) X ) Z WHERE Z.ATCL_ID = #{atclId}
/* SQL ID : BbsViewDAO.bbsViewCntSelect 설 명 : 게시판 조회자 목록 수 */ SELECT INQ_CNT FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE ATCL_ID = #{atclId}
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.bbsAtclOptnRegist 설 명 : 게시글 > 게시글 옵션 저장 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_OPTN A USING ( SELECT #{atclOptnId} AS ATCL_OPTN_ID , #{atclId} AS ATCL_ID , (SELECT CD FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'SYS_NTC_OPTN_TYCD' AND CD_VL = #{optnCd}) AS T_OPTN_CD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'SYS_NTC_OPTN_TYCD' AND CD_VL = #{optnCd}) AS T_OPTNNM , #{optnUseyn} AS T_OPTN_USEYN , #{optnSdttm} AS T_OPTN_SDTTM , #{optnEdttm} AS T_OPTN_EDTTM , #{rgtrId} AS T_RGTR_ID FROM DUAL ) B ON (A.ATCL_ID = B.ATCL_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.OPTN_CD = B.T_OPTN_CD , A.OPTNNM = B.T_OPTNNM , A.OPTN_USEYN = B.T_OPTN_USEYN , A.OPTN_SDTTM = B.T_OPTN_SDTTM , A.OPTN_EDTTM = B.T_OPTN_EDTTM , A.MDFR_ID = B.T_RGTR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( ATCL_OPTN_ID , ATCL_ID , OPTN_CD , OPTNNM , OPTN_USEYN , OPTN_SDTTM , OPTN_EDTTM , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( B.ATCL_OPTN_ID , B.ATCL_ID , B.T_OPTN_CD , B.T_OPTNNM , B.T_OPTN_USEYN , B.T_OPTN_SDTTM , B.T_OPTN_EDTTM , B.T_RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.selectBbsSbjctDtlView 설 명 : 게시글 > 게시글 상세보기 */ SELECT B.ORG_ID , B.DEPT_ID , B.SBJCT_ID , C.OPTN_CD , C.OPTNNM , C.OPTN_USEYN , C.OPTN_SDTTM , C.OPTN_EDTTM , B.ATCL_TTL , B.ATCL_CTS , B.DVCLAS_NO , B.CMNT_PRMYN , B.RSRVYN , B.RSRV_SDTTM , B.RSRV_EDTTM , B.OYN , B.NTC_GBNCD , B.AUTO_ALIMYN , B.AUTO_ALIM_SDTTM , B.AUTO_ALIM_EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_BBS A JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_OPTN C ON B.ATCL_ID = C.ATCL_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND B.ATCL_ID = #{atclId}
